description_long: This is a classic party hat made from lightweight, thin paperboard shaped into a tall, pointed cone. The surface is white and decorated with evenly spaced, colorful polka dots in red, blue, and green, giving it a festive appearance. A thin, elastic string is attached at the base, designed to secure the hat under the chin when worn. The hat's structure is simple, with no brim and a smooth, continuous surface from the base to the tip. The interior is hollow, allowing it to fit comfortably on a person's head. The overall finish is matte, with a slight texture visible on the paper surface.
description: A white, cone-shaped party hat with colorful polka dots and an elastic chin strap, made of lightweight paperboard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full cone shape, colorful polka dots, and the elastic strap symmetrically on both sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curve of the cone and the elastic strap extending to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view with the elastic strap visible on both sides and the polka dot pattern wrapping around the cone.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the elastic strap extending to the right and the polka dot pattern continuing.
